# Video API Cost

> Video API Cost helps developers estimate and compare AI video generation API costs before building or scaling a product.

Pricing is manually collected from public provider pricing pages and normalized to USD per output second for consistent comparisons.

## Core pages

- https://videoapicost.com/
- https://videoapicost.com/video-generation-api-pricing
- https://videoapicost.com/seedance-2-pricing-calculator

## Current calculator

The Seedance 2 Pricing Calculator compares public Seedance 2 pricing across fal.ai, PiAPI, OpenRouter, and EvoLink.

The default scenario is 1,000 videos/month × 8 seconds/video.

For fair provider comparisons, use the same selected output resolution. The recommended default comparison uses 720p rows.

## Formula

monthly cost = videos per month × seconds per video × provider price per second

## Disclaimer

Pricing estimates are not billing guarantees. Users should verify pricing and availability on the linked provider pages before production use.

## Site files

- https://videoapicost.com/sitemap.xml
- https://videoapicost.com/robots.txt
